interactive_sessions.note: counts and structural failure categories/progress-label counts only — never tactic text, goal text, diagnostics, or a reconstructed proof body. kernel_verified is true only when a session's reconstructed script has a linked verified_attempt_id whose verification_outcome is "committed" — never inferred from is_solved/reports_complete/progress_label_counts.

root_formal_statement: ∀ x : ℝ, 2 ≤ x → ∫ t in (2:ℝ)..x, (Real.log t + 1) / (t^2 * (Real.log t)^2) = (2 * Real.log 2)⁻¹ - (x * Real.log x)⁻¹
